content: [{"id":"880f642f-16de-4052-b5bd-88fef722c843","component":"Section","data":{"title":"Get In Touch","subtitle":"","align":"left","background":"none","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"a5b29f65-8209-4a70-9798-f75993e79126","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"1d516ce3-dba3-4eff-ae63-0852f01fb59b","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Whether it's a role, a project, or just a conversation about CLR internals, I'm always happy to talk.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"1c42e46d-2a95-443f-aaf7-1a88587796bd","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I'm currently open to senior engineering roles working primarily in PHP, C# or Node.js, either remote or Sheffield-based. If you have something that plays to deep technical knowledge, interesting problems and a team that cares about doing things properly, that's where I do my best work. I'm open to both permanent and contract arrangements, so don't let that stop you reaching out.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"73a4d8fa-675a-42b8-8d83-6da5e6908f9e","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I'm currently available and responding to enquiries. Drop me a message using the form below, or reach me directly via the links on this page.
